candidate_check.description: The Publish to Global Address List (GAL) button must be disabled in Outlook.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Cryptography >> Do not display 'Publish to GAL' button is set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\outlook\security

If the value for publishtogaldisabled is REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Outlook 2016 >> Security >> Cryptography >> Do not display 'Publish to GAL' button to "Enabled".
title: The Publish to Global Address List (GAL) button must be disabled in Outlook.
